Our Approach

Bridging the Gap Between Strategy and Execution

Whether work is getting delayed, repeated, or stuck, we provide the clarity and structure you need. From diagnosing deep-rooted workflow issues to setting up market plans and delivering complex projects, we implement solutions that actually work.

Diagnostic Checklist: Is it time for a process review?

If you find yourself nodding to three or more of these points, your operations are leaking time and margin:

  • Work gets delayed, repeated, or stuck, but you cannot clearly see where or why.
  • Your team relies on "tribal knowledge"—if a key person is away, things grind to a halt.
  • Responsibilities are blurry; tasks fall through the cracks because no one formally owns them.
  • Important operational information is scattered across emails, loose notes, and disjointed software.
  • You feel like your current systems cannot handle taking on more volume or scaling up.
Our Process

How It Works

Our approach is designed to move you from operational confusion to practical, measurable improvement—without overcomplicating the process.

1

Discovery

We begin by reviewing how your business currently runs, identifying the root causes behind delays, bottlenecks, duplicated effort, and communication breakdowns.

2

Mapping

We turn messy, undocumented routines into clear visual workflows, showing each step, decision point, handover, and responsibility across the process.

3

Optimisation

We simplify and strengthen the workflow by removing inefficiencies, clarifying ownership, reducing rework, and building systems that support smoother execution.

4

Result

You walk away with clearer processes, stronger accountability, better visibility across operations, and a practical foundation for consistent delivery and growth.

The Transformation

Stop Guessing. Start Executing.

From chaotic guesswork to standardised, predictable digital workflows.

Before

The Messy Whiteboard

Unclear responsibilities, scattered information across emails, constant delays, and disconnected team efforts causing you to bleed margin.

After

Clean BPMN 2.0 Digital Map

Standardised visual processes, crystal-clear accountability, streamlined communication, and measurable project tracking.

Who We Are

About EPC

Elevate Process Consulting (EPC) is a dedicated consulting partner for growing businesses based in Perth, WA. We are passionate about taking the friction out of daily operations. Our team works closely with you to untangle complex workflows, creating transparent processes and building operational rhythm that allows your business to scale effortlessly.

Meet the Founders Behind EPC

EPC was built by two professionals who understand that operational friction rarely comes from just one issue. It usually sits between people, process, communication, and execution. That is why our work is practical, hands-on, and grounded in real business environments. We do not just point out what is wrong—we help you create a clearer way forward.

Archie and Vitória combine project delivery discipline with practical process improvement to help growing businesses move with more clarity, structure, and confidence.

Archie S

Co-Founder & Managing Partner — Project Delivery & Operations

Archie brings a decade of experience leading projects, coordinating stakeholders, and delivering operational improvements across industrial, construction, healthcare, and manufacturing environments. He helps clients bring structure to complexity—turning moving parts into clear plans, stronger accountability, and practical momentum that keeps work moving.

  • Translating complex work into practical, executable plans
  • Aligning timelines, stakeholders, and priorities around delivery
  • Helping growing businesses move from reactive to structured execution

Vitória S

Co-Founder & Managing Partner — Process Improvement & Strategy

Vitória brings a decade of experience improving the day-to-day systems that keep businesses running. She works closely with teams to untangle inefficient workflows, strengthen coordination, and turn operational friction into clearer, more consistent ways of working. Her focus is on building practical structure that is easier to follow, easier to manage, and strong enough to support sustainable growth.

  • Mapping workflows and exposing hidden inefficiencies
  • Strengthening accountability, coordination, and follow-through
  • Designing simple systems that teams can actually use and sustain

Why clients choose EPC

Together, we combine structured thinking, delivery discipline, and practical process improvement. EPC exists to help growing businesses create more clarity, stronger accountability, and better operational rhythm—so work flows more smoothly and progress no longer depends on guesswork.

Service Ladder

Our Consulting Offers

Low-Risk Entry
Process Optimisation

Process Mapping Diagnostic

20 fixed value-added hours
The perfect low-risk first engagement. Best for businesses that know work is getting delayed, repeated, or stuck but cannot clearly see why.
  • Discovery call and issue framing
  • 1 site visit or virtual workshop
  • Critical process workflow
  • Pain point and bottleneck summary
  • Quick-win recommendations
  • Short action roadmap
Market Strategy

Market Research & Plan

40 fixed value-added hours
Best for: Clients that need clearer direction on target market, customer demand, competitor positioning, and practical growth actions.
  • Business and market context review
  • Target customer and segment analysis
  • Competitor scan and positioning insights
  • Market opportunity summary
  • Practical marketing and growth action plan
  • 30-60 day priority roadmap
Operational Structure

Operations Coordination Setup

25 - 50 value-added hours
Best for: Businesses that need more structure in planning, meetings, scheduling, accountability, and follow-up.
  • Responsibility matrix
  • Meeting cadence and agenda templates
  • Task and action tracking
  • Weekly coordination rhythm
  • Simple KPI and reporting structure
  • Admin and filing discipline
Implementation Support

Project Management Delivery

Customised hours based on project
Best for: Defined operational changes, implementation work, installations, upgrades, or business improvement projects.
  • Project charter or brief
  • Timeline and milestone tracking
  • Risk and issue register
  • Stakeholder coordination
  • Execution follow-up
  • Close-out and lessons learned
